document.title: How the Fund Works — UNJSPF Video
document.revision: UNJSPF Video: How the Fund Works

chunks.heading: How does someone become a participant in the Fund?
chunks.text: When you have a staff contract with a UN pension fund member organization for six months or more, you become a participant in the fund, unless your contract excludes participation in the fund.

chunks.heading: How are contributions made to the Fund?
chunks.text: As a participant, a percentage of your salary based on your pensionable remuneration is paid into the fund each month. The member organization that employs you pays twice the amount that you pay.

chunks.heading: How many participants and member organizations currently contribute to the Fund?
chunks.text: Today more than 140,000 individuals and 25 member organizations make monthly payments into the fund.

chunks.heading: How does the Fund ensure it can pay future benefits?
chunks.text: Fund capital is invested, and the income from these investments ensures that the fund is able to meet its obligation to pay benefits into the future.

chunks.heading: What is a defined benefit plan, and how does it differ from a defined contribution plan?
chunks.text: The UN pension fund is known as a defined benefit plan. It pools all of the contributions received. Your benefit at retirement is based on how long you contributed to the fund and the level, grade and step at which you contributed, and it's guaranteed for life. This differs from a defined contribution plan, which is another category of pension plan where there is a separate account for each individual and benefits are based on the market value of the invested contributions.

chunks.heading: How many retirees and beneficiaries receive monthly benefits from the Fund, and in how many countries?
chunks.text: The fund pays out monthly benefits to more than 80,000 retirees and other beneficiaries in more than 190 countries and territories.

chunks.heading: How are the Fund's regulations and rules applied?
chunks.text: The regulations and rules of the fund are strictly implemented to safeguard the fund's financial security and pensions.
